items.contentSnippet:
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
Language: Python
Stars: 36733
Forks: 2992
items.creator: mvanhorn

summaries.zh: 这是一个用Python编写的AI代理技能，能够跨Reddit、X、YouTube、Hacker News、Polymarket及网络研究任意主题，并生成基于事实的摘要。该项目拥有超过3.6万星标和近3000个分支。
summaries.en: This is an AI agent skill named "last30days-skill," built in Python, designed to research topics across multiple platforms, including Reddit, X (formerly Twitter), YouTube, Hacker News (HN), Polymarket, and the broader web. Its primary function is to synthesize the gathered information into a grounded summary. The project is hosted on GitHub, where it has received 36,733 stars and 2,992 forks.

items.title: Andyyyy64/whichllm
items.content:
Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

Language: Python
Stars: 3943
Forks: 220
items.contentSnippet:
Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.
Language: Python
Stars: 3943
Forks: 220
items.creator: Andyyyy64

summaries.zh: 这是一个名为"Andyyyy64/whichllm"的GitHub项目。其主要功能是帮助用户找到最适合自己硬件的本地大语言模型，通过实际运行基准测试进行排名，而非依赖参数数量。该项目使用Python编写，提供简单命令即可运行，目前获得3943个星标和220个分支。
summaries.en: The repository "Andyyyy64/whichllm" is a tool designed to help users identify the best-performing local large language model (LLM) for their specific hardware. It ranks models based on real-world performance benchmarks, prioritizing actual speed and capability over theoretical parameter counts. The tool is implemented in Python and can be run with a single command for immediate results. It is a popular open-source project, as indicated by its 3,943 stars and 220 forks on GitHub.

items.summary: 这是一个名为"Andyyyy64/whichllm"的GitHub项目。其主要功能是帮助用户找到最适合自己硬件的本地大语言模型，通过实际运行基准测试进行排名，而非依赖参数数量。该项目使用Python编写，提供简单命令即可运行，目前获得3943个星标和220个分支。
